info.name: QueroComidaHub TC2
info.description: Tech Challenge 2 - FIAP - Pós-graduação em Arquitetura de Software e Desenvolvimento Java

item.name: UserType
Error Path
01 - Create user type: blank name (400)
02 - Create user type: name longer than 50 chars (400)
03 - Create user type: duplicate name (409)
04 - Get user type by id: id does not exist (404)
05 - Update user type: id does not exist (404)
06 - Update user type: system type is protected (409)
07 - Update user type: duplicate name (409)
08 - Update user type: blank name (400)
09 - Delete user type: id does not exist (404)
10 - Delete user type: system type is protected (409)
11.1 - Setup: create a custom type (Entregador)
11.2 - Setup: create a user with that custom type
11.3 - Delete the custom type while a user still has it (409)
11.4 - Cleanup: move that user back to Cliente (frees the type)
11.5 - Delete the now-unused custom type (204)
12 - Get user type by id: non-numeric id in path (400)
13 - Create user type: malformed JSON body (400)
14 - Delete on the collection URL: method not allowed (405)
15 - Call an unknown route (404)
Happy Path
01 - List all user types
02 - Get a seeded user type by id
03 - Create a user type
04 - Create a user type that can manage restaurants
05 - Update the user type created above
06 - Delete the user type created above
User
Error Path
01 - Create user: blank name (400)
02 - Create user: invalid email format (400)
03 - Create user: userTypeId is null (400)
04 - Create user: userTypeId does not exist (400)
05 - Create user: duplicate email (409)
06 - Get user by id: id does not exist (404)
07 - Update user: id does not exist (404)
08 - Update user: duplicate email (409)
09 - Change user type: user does not exist (404)
10 - Change user type: target userTypeId does not exist (400)
11 - Change user type: user still owns restaurants (409)
12 - Delete user: id does not exist (404)
13 - Delete user: user still owns restaurants (409)
14 - Get user by id: non-numeric id in path (400)
15 - Create user: malformed JSON body (400)
16 - Delete on the collection URL: method not allowed (405)
17 - Create user: blank email (400)
18 - Create user: blank address (400)
19 - Create user: name longer than 255 chars (400)
20 - Update user: blank email (400)
21 - Change user type: request body missing (400)
22 - Change user type: userTypeId is null (400)
Happy Path
01 - List all users
02 - Get a seeded user by id
03 - Create a user (Cliente)
04 - Create a user (Dono de Restaurante)
05 - Update the user created above
06 - Change the created user's type to Dono
07 - Change the user's type again to the same type (idempotent)
08 - Delete the user created above
Restaurant
Error Path
01 - Create restaurant: X-User-Id header missing (401)
02 - Create restaurant: caller cannot manage restaurants (403)
03 - Create restaurant: blank name (400)
04 - Create restaurant: malformed JSON body (400)
05 - Get restaurant by id: id does not exist (404)
06 - Get restaurant by id: non-numeric id in path (400)
07 - Update restaurant: caller is not the owner (403)
08 - Update restaurant: id does not exist (404)
09 - Delete restaurant: caller is not the owner (403)
10 - Delete restaurant: id does not exist (404)
11 - Delete on the collection URL: method not allowed (405)
12 - Create restaurant: name longer than 255 chars (400)
Happy Path
01 - List all restaurants
02 - Get a seeded restaurant by id
03 - Create a restaurant
04 - Update the restaurant created above
05 - Delete the restaurant created above
MenuItem
Error Path
01 - Create menu item: X-User-Id header missing (401)
02 - Create menu item: caller is not the restaurant owner (403)
03 - Create menu item: blank name (400)
04 - Create menu item: price is zero or negative (400)
05 - Create menu item: restaurant does not exist (404)
06 - Get menu item by id: menu item does not exist (404)
07 - Get menu item by id: restaurant does not exist (404)
08 - Update menu item: caller is not the restaurant owner (403)
09 - Update menu item: menu item does not exist (404)
10 - Delete menu item: caller is not the restaurant owner (403)
11 - Delete menu item: menu item does not exist (404)
12 - Delete on the collection URL: method not allowed (405)
13 - Create menu item: name longer than 255 chars (400)
Happy Path
01 - List all menu items of the seeded restaurant
02 - Get a seeded menu item by id
03 - Create a menu item
04 - Update the menu item created above
05 - Delete the menu item created above
